{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Program.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01AvgM642VXLZGecyJDyaYh6"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Program.cs","old_string":"var casinos = new List<Casino> { casino1, casino2, casino3 };\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);","new_string":"var casinos  = new List<Casino>  { casino1, casino2, casino3 };\nvar players  = new List<Player>  { player1, player2, player3, player4, player5 };\nvar allTables = casinos.SelectMany(c => c.Tables).ToList();\n\n// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// LINQ QUERIES\n// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n//\n// WHAT IS LINQ?\n//   Language Integrated Query – a set of extension methods on IEnumerable<T>\n//   that lets you filter, transform, sort and aggregate collections using\n//   a readable, SQL-like syntax directly in C#.\n//\n// DEFERRED vs IMMEDIATE execution\n//   Most LINQ methods (Where, Select, OrderBy…) are LAZY – they build a query\n//   but do NOT run it until you iterate the result (foreach) or call a\n//   terminating method (ToList, ToArray, First, Count, Sum…).\n//   That terminating call is what actually executes the query.\n//\n// async / await\n//   When a method does I/O (database, network, file) it can be marked async\n//   and return Task<T>.  Inside it you use await to pause execution and\n//   yield the thread back to the thread-pool until the I/O completes.\n//   This keeps the server responsive under load – threads are NOT blocked\n//   while waiting for the database to reply.\n//   Rule of thumb: if EF Core gives you an Async method (ToListAsync,\n//   FirstOrDefaultAsync…) always prefer it over the sync version.\n//\n// ── 1. WHERE – filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Find all tables that are currently available (not occupied)\"\nvar availableTables = allTables\n    .Where(t => t.IsAvailable)          // keep only tables where IsAvailable == true\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 2. SELECT – project / transform ─────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Get a flat list of casino names\"\nvar casinoNames = casinos\n    .Select(c => c.Name)                // extract just the Name string from each Casino\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 3. ORDER BY – sort ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"List players sorted by balance, highest first (VIP order)\"\nvar playersByBalance = players\n    .OrderByDescending(p => p.Balance)  // sort descending on Balance\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 4. WHERE + SELECT (chained) ──────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Get emails of all players with balance over 1000 (high-rollers)\"\nvar highRollerEmails = players\n    .Where(p => p.Balance > 1000)       // filter\n    .Select(p => p.Email)               // project to email string\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 5. SELECTMANY – flatten nested collections ───────────────────────────────\n// \"Get every transaction from every player in one flat list\"\nvar allTransactions = players\n    .SelectMany(p => p.Transactions)    // flatten List<Transaction> per player into one sequence\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 6. SUM / COUNT – aggregation ─────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Total amount won across all players\"\nvar totalWon = allTransactions\n    .Where(t => t.Type == TransactionType.Win)\n    .Sum(t => t.Amount);                // Sum is a terminating call – executes immediately\n\n// \"How many tables does each casino have?\"\nvar tableCountPerCasino = casinos\n    .Select(c => new { c.Name, TableCount = c.Tables.Count })\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 7. FIRST / FIRSTORDEFAULT ────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Find the player with the highest single win transaction\"\n// FirstOrDefault returns null instead of throwing when nothing matches.\nvar biggestWin = allTransactions\n    .Where(t => t.Type == TransactionType.Win)\n    .OrderByDescending(t => t.Amount)\n    .FirstOrDefault();                  // terminating – returns one item or null\n\n// ── 8. GROUPBY – grouping ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Group available tables by game type so the lobby screen can show sections\"\nvar tablesByGame = allTables\n    .Where(t => t.IsAvailable)\n    .GroupBy(t => t.Game.Type)          // key = GameType enum value\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── 9. ANY / ALL ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n// \"Does any casino have a poker table free right now?\"\nbool pokerAvailable = casinos\n    .Any(c => c.Tables.Any(t => t.Game.Type == GameType.Poker && t.IsAvailable));\n\n// ── 10. JOIN (via navigation property) ──────────────────────────────────────\n// \"For each reservation, show player full name + casino name + game name\"\nvar reservationSummary = reservations\n    .Select(r => new\n    {\n        Player  = $\"{r.Player.FirstName} {r.Player.LastName}\",\n        Casino  = r.Table.Casino?.Name ?? \"N/A\",\n        Game    = r.Table.Game.Name,\n        At      = r.ReservedAt\n    })\n    .OrderBy(r => r.At)\n    .ToList();\n\n// ── ASYNC EXAMPLE (how the same queries look against the real DB) ────────────\n//\n//   async Task<List<Table>> GetAvailableTablesAsync(CasinoDbContext db)\n//   {\n//       // await tells the runtime: \"start this DB query, release the thread,\n//       // resume here once results arrive – do NOT block\"\n//       return await db.Tables\n//           .Include(t => t.Game)           // eagerly load the related Game row\n//           .Where(t => t.IsAvailable)\n//           .ToListAsync();                 // async terminating call\n//   }\n//\n//   async Task<decimal> GetTotalWonAsync(CasinoDbContext db)\n//   {\n//       return await db.Transactions\n//           .Where(t => t.Type == TransactionType.Win)\n//           .SumAsync(t => t.Amount);       // async aggregation\n//   }\n//\n//   Without async/await you would write: db.Tables.Where(...).ToList()\n//   That BLOCKS the thread for the entire round-trip to the SQL server.\n//   Under concurrent load this exhausts the thread-pool and the app stalls.\n//   With ToListAsync() + await the thread is free to serve other requests\n//   while SQL Server is working.\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Duo468ga5QHc5qoBzB5oqj"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"dotnet build 2>&1 | tail -5","timeout":60000,"description":"Build to verify no errors"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01L7DaCF3JTzGXSS42uF8Pb7"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","prompt":"\n| Kriterij | Bodovi |\n| --- | --- |\n| Granularno izvođenje agenta po taskovima | 1 |\n| Ispitivanje agenta za pojašnjenja | 1 |\n| Usmeno ispitivanje LINQ/await ili C# koncepata | 2 |\n| Objektni model projektnog zadatka | 2 |\n- [x]  Dodati javni GitHub repozitorij koji će biti za rad na projektu (sve slati na ‘main’ branch)\n    - [x]  Javiti na mail GitHub repo link **najkasnije do 20.3.**\n    - [x]  Sav kod koji se ocjenjuje mora biti na GH repozitoriju\n    - [x]  U root folder repozitorija dodati folder lab-1 gdje je potrebno uploadati “log” koristenja AI agenta\n- [x]  Potrebno je kreirati objektni model prema vlastitom projektnom zadatku, koji se sastoji od barem 7 klasa, gdje 4 klase moraju biti kompleksne (preko 5 svojstava). Svojstva trebaju biti smislena i dobrog tipa:\n- barem jedan vlastiti enum\n- barem jedno DateTime svojstvo\n- ispravne konekcije 1-N, N-N\n- [x]  Potrebno je u main programu “napuniti” objekte podacima - kreirati razgranato barem 3 glavna objekta.\n- primjeice, ako je tema aplikacije “Nogometni turnir”, potrebno je imati barem 3 turnira s po barem 3 ekipe.\n- [x]  U main programu je potrebno definirati smislene LINQ upite nad objektnim modelom koji će se kasnije (možda) koristiti u samoj aplikaciji\n    - [x]  Potrebno je razumjeti LINQ naredbe koje su dodane i moći ih modificirati uz pomoć AI agenta\n- [x]  Proučiti i razumjeti koncept async-await\n- [x]  Sav kod treba biti na GH **najkasnije do 2.4.2026. u 18:00** is everything here done?"}

{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","prompt":"Where can I see ouput of this program, it should be in cmd?"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Program.cs","old_string":"// ── ASYNC EXAMPLE (how the same queries look against the real DB) ────────────","new_string":"// ── OUTPUT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nConsole.WriteLine(\"=== 1. Available tables ===\");\nforeach (var t in availableTables)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  Table {t.TableNumber} | {t.Game.Name} | min bet: {t.MinBet}\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 2. Casino names ===\");\nforeach (var name in casinoNames)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {name}\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 3. Players by balance (VIP order) ===\");\nforeach (var p in playersByBalance)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {p.FirstName} {p.LastName} – {p.Balance} EUR\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 4. High-roller emails (balance > 1000) ===\");\nforeach (var email in highRollerEmails)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {email}\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 5. All transactions ===\");\nforeach (var t in allTransactions)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {t.Player.FirstName} | {t.Type} | {t.Amount} EUR | {t.CreatedAt:d}\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"\\n=== 6. Total won across all players: {totalWon} EUR ===\");\nforeach (var entry in tableCountPerCasino)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {entry.Name}: {entry.TableCount} tables\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 7. Biggest single win ===\");\nif (biggestWin != null)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {biggestWin.Amount} EUR by player ID {biggestWin.PlayerId}\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 8. Available tables grouped by game ===\");\nforeach (var group in tablesByGame)\n{\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  [{group.Key}]\");\n    foreach (var t in group)\n        Console.WriteLine($\"    Table {t.TableNumber} | min: {t.MinBet} EUR\");\n}\n\nConsole.WriteLine($\"\\n=== 9. Poker table available: {pokerAvailable} ===\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 10. Reservation summary ===\");\nforeach (var r in reservationSummary)\n    Console.WriteLine($\"  {r.Player} @ {r.Casino} – {r.Game} – {r.At:g}\");\n\nConsole.WriteLine();\n// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// ── ASYNC EXAMPLE (how the same queries look against the real DB) ────────────","replace_all":false},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HyU5DrVjLGmVGc9Bi7Qjfx"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"dotnet build /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet 2>&1 | tail -3","timeout":30000,"description":"Build to verify no errors"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_019RAQYJDXEeJggTkjkXnDoi"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","prompt":"Can you make this code more modularn and maintainable, by files and such. Comment as needed"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Read","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Program.cs"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_017HZLNM5Xippxzs81cLTztC"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Data/SeedData.cs","content":"using aspnet.Models;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Data;\n\n// Holds the in-memory seed data that is built once at startup.\npublic record CasinoSeedData(\n    List<Casino>     Casinos,\n    List<Player>     Players,\n    List<Reservation> Reservations\n);\n\n// Builds all in-memory objects (games, casinos, players, transactions,\n// reservations) and wires up their navigation properties.\npublic static class SeedData\n{\n    public static CasinoSeedData Create()\n    {\n        // ── Games ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n        var blackjack = new Game { Id = 1, Name = \"Blackjack\",    Type = GameType.Blackjack, MinBet = 10, MaxBet = 500,  Description = \"Classic card game\" };\n        var poker     = new Game { Id = 2, Name = \"Texas Hold'em\",Type = GameType.Poker,     MinBet = 20, MaxBet = 1000, Description = \"Most popular poker variant\" };\n        var roulette  = new Game { Id = 3, Name = \"Roulette\",     Type = GameType.Roulette,  MinBet = 5,  MaxBet = 300,  Description = \"European single-zero roulette\" };\n        var slots     = new Game { Id = 4, Name = \"Lucky Slots\",  Type = GameType.Slots,     MinBet = 1,  MaxBet = 50,   Description = \"Progressive jackpot slots\" };\n\n        // ── Players ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n        var player1 = new Player { Id = 1, FirstName = \"Marko\",    LastName = \"Horvat\",  Email = \"marko@mail.com\",    DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1990, 5,  12), Balance = 1500 };\n        var player2 = new Player { Id = 2, FirstName = \"Ana\",      LastName = \"Kovač\",   Email = \"ana@mail.com\",      DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1995, 8,  23), Balance = 800  };\n        var player3 = new Player { Id = 3, FirstName = \"Ivan\",     LastName = \"Babić\",   Email = \"ivan@mail.com\",     DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1988, 3,   7), Balance = 3200 };\n        var player4 = new Player { Id = 4, FirstName = \"Petra\",    LastName = \"Novak\",   Email = \"petra@mail.com\",    DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1993, 11, 30), Balance = 600  };\n        var player5 = new Player { Id = 5, FirstName = \"Tomislav\", LastName = \"Jurić\",   Email = \"tomislav@mail.com\", DateOfBirth = new DateTime(1985, 6,  19), Balance = 5000 };\n\n        // ── Casinos (each with 3 tables and 3 employees) ──────────────────────\n        var casino1 = new Casino\n        {\n            Id = 1, Name = \"Royal Vegas\", Address = \"Ilica 12, Zagreb\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-CAS-001\", FoundedDate = new DateTime(2005, 4, 15),\n            Employees = new List<Employee>\n            {\n                new() { Id = 1, FirstName = \"Luka\",  LastName = \"Perić\",  Position = \"Dealer\",   CasinoId = 1 },\n                new() { Id = 2, FirstName = \"Sara\",  LastName = \"Blažić\", Position = \"Manager\",  CasinoId = 1 },\n                new() { Id = 3, FirstName = \"Josip\", LastName = \"Matić\",  Position = \"Security\", CasinoId = 1 },\n            },\n            Tables = new List<Table>\n            {\n                new() { Id = 1, TableNumber = 1, IsAvailable = true,  MinBet = 10, MaxBet = 500,  CasinoId = 1, Game = blackjack, GameId = 1 },\n                new() { Id = 2, TableNumber = 2, IsAvailable = false, MinBet = 20, MaxBet = 1000, CasinoId = 1, Game = poker,     GameId = 2 },\n                new() { Id = 3, TableNumber = 3, IsAvailable = true,  MinBet = 5,  MaxBet = 300,  CasinoId = 1, Game = roulette,  GameId = 3 },\n            }\n        };\n\n        var casino2 = new Casino\n        {\n            Id = 2, Name = \"Golden Palace\", Address = \"Vukovarska 55, Split\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-CAS-002\", FoundedDate = new DateTime(2010, 9, 1),\n            Employees = new List<Employee>\n            {\n                new() { Id = 4, FirstName = \"Maja\",     LastName = \"Šimić\", Position = \"Dealer\",  CasinoId = 2 },\n                new() { Id = 5, FirstName = \"Darko\",    LastName = \"Vukić\", Position = \"Manager\", CasinoId = 2 },\n                new() { Id = 6, FirstName = \"Nikolina\", LastName = \"Čović\", Position = \"Cashier\", CasinoId = 2 },\n            },\n            Tables = new List<Table>\n            {\n                new() { Id = 4, TableNumber = 1, IsAvailable = true,  MinBet = 20, MaxBet = 1000, CasinoId = 2, Game = poker,    GameId = 2 },\n                new() { Id = 5, TableNumber = 2, IsAvailable = true,  MinBet = 5,  MaxBet = 300,  CasinoId = 2, Game = roulette, GameId = 3 },\n                new() { Id = 6, TableNumber = 3, IsAvailable = false, MinBet = 1,  MaxBet = 50,   CasinoId = 2, Game = slots,    GameId = 4 },\n            }\n        };\n\n        var casino3 = new Casino\n        {\n            Id = 3, Name = \"Diamond Club\", Address = \"Korzo 3, Rijeka\",\n            LicenseNumber = \"HR-CAS-003\", FoundedDate = new DateTime(2018, 2, 20),\n            Employees = new List<Employee>\n            {\n                new() { Id = 7, FirstName = \"Bruno\", LastName = \"Knežević\", Position = \"Dealer\",   CasinoId = 3 },\n                new() { Id = 8, FirstName = \"Ivana\", LastName = \"Turić\",    Position = \"Manager\",  CasinoId = 3 },\n                new() { Id = 9, FirstName = \"Ante\",  LastName = \"Grgić\",    Position = \"Security\", CasinoId = 3 },\n            },\n            Tables = new List<Table>\n            {\n                new() { Id = 7, TableNumber = 1, IsAvailable = true,  MinBet = 10, MaxBet = 500,  CasinoId = 3, Game = blackjack, GameId = 1 },\n                new() { Id = 8, TableNumber = 2, IsAvailable = true,  MinBet = 1,  MaxBet = 50,   CasinoId = 3, Game = slots,     GameId = 4 },\n                new() { Id = 9, TableNumber = 3, IsAvailable = false, MinBet = 20, MaxBet = 1000, CasinoId = 3, Game = poker,     GameId = 2 },\n            }\n        };\n\n        // ── Transactions (attached to players) ────────────────────────────────\n        player1.Transactions.AddRange(new[]\n        {\n            new Transaction { Id = 1, Amount = 500,  Type = TransactionType.Deposit,    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 1, 10), PlayerId = 1, Player = player1 },\n            new Transaction { Id = 2, Amount = 200,  Type = TransactionType.Bet,        CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 1, 10), PlayerId = 1, Player = player1 },\n            new Transaction { Id = 3, Amount = 450,  Type = TransactionType.Win,        CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 1, 10), PlayerId = 1, Player = player1 },\n        });\n        player2.Transactions.AddRange(new[]\n        {\n            new Transaction { Id = 4, Amount = 300,  Type = TransactionType.Deposit,    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 2, 5),  PlayerId = 2, Player = player2 },\n            new Transaction { Id = 5, Amount = 150,  Type = TransactionType.Bet,        CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 2, 5),  PlayerId = 2, Player = player2 },\n            new Transaction { Id = 6, Amount = 100,  Type = TransactionType.Withdrawal, CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 2, 6),  PlayerId = 2, Player = player2 },\n        });\n        player3.Transactions.AddRange(new[]\n        {\n            new Transaction { Id = 7, Amount = 1000, Type = TransactionType.Deposit,    CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 3, 1),  PlayerId = 3, Player = player3 },\n            new Transaction { Id = 8, Amount = 500,  Type = TransactionType.Bet,        CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 3, 1),  PlayerId = 3, Player = player3 },\n            new Transaction { Id = 9, Amount = 800,  Type = TransactionType.Win,        CreatedAt = new DateTime(2024, 3, 1),  PlayerId = 3, Player = player3 },\n        });\n\n        // ── Reservations – N-N between Player and Table ───────────────────────\n        var reservations = new List<Reservation>\n        {\n            new() { Id = 1, ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 4, 10, 20, 0, 0), PlayerId = 1, Player = player1, TableId = 1, Table = casino1.Tables[0] },\n            new() { Id = 2, ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 4, 10, 21, 0, 0), PlayerId = 2, Player = player2, TableId = 4, Table = casino2.Tables[0] },\n            new() { Id = 3, ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 4, 11, 18, 0, 0), PlayerId = 3, Player = player3, TableId = 7, Table = casino3.Tables[0] },\n            new() { Id = 4, ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 4, 12, 19, 0, 0), PlayerId = 1, Player = player1, TableId = 5, Table = casino2.Tables[1] },\n            new() { Id = 5, ReservedAt = new DateTime(2024, 4, 12, 22, 0, 0), PlayerId = 5, Player = player5, TableId = 2, Table = casino1.Tables[1] },\n        };\n\n        // Wire reservations back onto players (the N side of N-N)\n        player1.Reservations.Add(reservations[0]);\n        player1.Reservations.Add(reservations[3]);\n        player2.Reservations.Add(reservations[1]);\n        player3.Reservations.Add(reservations[2]);\n        player5.Reservations.Add(reservations[4]);\n\n        return new CasinoSeedData(\n            Casinos:      new List<Casino> { casino1, casino2, casino3 },\n            Players:      new List<Player> { player1, player2, player3, player4, player5 },\n            Reservations: reservations\n        );\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PeF1QsoPXg6w1VWrVJRmXv"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Queries/CasinoQueries.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Models;\n\nnamespace aspnet.Queries;\n\n// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n// LINQ QUERY REFERENCE\n// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n//\n// WHAT IS LINQ?\n//   Language Integrated Query – extension methods on IEnumerable<T> that let\n//   you filter, transform, sort, and aggregate collections in a readable,\n//   SQL-like syntax directly in C#.\n//\n// DEFERRED vs IMMEDIATE execution\n//   Most LINQ methods (Where, Select, OrderBy…) are LAZY – they build a\n//   pipeline but do NOT run until you iterate or call a terminating method:\n//   ToList / ToArray / First / Count / Sum / Any …\n//\n// async / await\n//   Mark a method async and return Task<T>.  Inside it, use await on I/O\n//   operations so the calling thread is released while waiting (e.g. for a\n//   DB response).  EF Core provides async variants of every terminating\n//   method: ToListAsync, FirstOrDefaultAsync, SumAsync, AnyAsync …\n//   Always prefer them in controller actions to keep the server responsive.\n//\n//   Sync  (blocks the thread): db.Tables.Where(…).ToList()\n//   Async (frees the thread):  await db.Tables.Where(…).ToListAsync()\n//\n// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\npublic static class CasinoQueries\n{\n    // Entry point – runs all queries against the in-memory seed data and\n    // prints results to the console.\n    public static void RunAndPrint(CasinoSeedData data)\n    {\n        // Derive a flat table list once; used by several queries below.\n        var allTables       = data.Casinos.SelectMany(c => c.Tables).ToList();\n        var allTransactions = data.Players.SelectMany(p => p.Transactions).ToList();\n\n        PrintAvailableTables(allTables);\n        PrintCasinoNames(data.Casinos);\n        PrintPlayersByBalance(data.Players);\n        PrintHighRollerEmails(data.Players);\n        PrintAllTransactions(allTransactions);\n        PrintAggregates(allTransactions, data.Casinos);\n        PrintBiggestWin(allTransactions);\n        PrintTablesByGame(allTables);\n        PrintPokerAvailability(data.Casinos);\n        PrintReservationSummary(data.Reservations);\n    }\n\n    // ── 1. WHERE – filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    // Keeps only the tables where IsAvailable == true.\n    private static void PrintAvailableTables(List<Table> allTables)\n    {\n        var available = allTables\n            .Where(t => t.IsAvailable)\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"=== 1. Available tables ===\");\n        foreach (var t in available)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  Table {t.TableNumber} | {t.Game.Name} | min bet: {t.MinBet} EUR\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 2. SELECT – project / transform ──────────────────────────────────────\n    // Extracts just the Name string from each Casino object.\n    private static void PrintCasinoNames(List<Casino> casinos)\n    {\n        var names = casinos\n            .Select(c => c.Name)\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 2. Casino names ===\");\n        foreach (var name in names)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {name}\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 3. ORDERBY – sort ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    // Sorts players descending by Balance (highest balance = VIP first).\n    private static void PrintPlayersByBalance(List<Player> players)\n    {\n        var sorted = players\n            .OrderByDescending(p => p.Balance)\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 3. Players by balance (VIP order) ===\");\n        foreach (var p in sorted)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {p.FirstName} {p.LastName} – {p.Balance} EUR\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 4. WHERE + SELECT (chained) ───────────────────────────────────────────\n    // First filters to high-rollers, then projects down to just their email.\n    private static void PrintHighRollerEmails(List<Player> players)\n    {\n        var emails = players\n            .Where(p => p.Balance > 1000)\n            .Select(p => p.Email)\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 4. High-roller emails (balance > 1000) ===\");\n        foreach (var email in emails)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {email}\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 5. SELECTMANY – flatten nested collections ────────────────────────────\n    // Each player has a List<Transaction>; SelectMany flattens all of them\n    // into a single sequence.\n    private static void PrintAllTransactions(List<Transaction> allTransactions)\n    {\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 5. All transactions ===\");\n        foreach (var t in allTransactions)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {t.Player.FirstName} | {t.Type} | {t.Amount} EUR | {t.CreatedAt:d}\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 6. SUM / COUNT – aggregation ─────────────────────────────────────────\n    // Sum is a terminating call – it executes the query immediately and returns\n    // a single scalar value (not a collection).\n    private static void PrintAggregates(List<Transaction> allTransactions, List<Casino> casinos)\n    {\n        var totalWon = allTransactions\n            .Where(t => t.Type == TransactionType.Win)\n            .Sum(t => t.Amount);\n\n        // Anonymous projection: new { Name, TableCount }\n        var tableCountPerCasino = casinos\n            .Select(c => new { c.Name, TableCount = c.Tables.Count })\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"\\n=== 6. Total won across all players: {totalWon} EUR ===\");\n        foreach (var entry in tableCountPerCasino)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {entry.Name}: {entry.TableCount} tables\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 7. FIRSTORDEFAULT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    // Returns the first match or null – never throws on an empty sequence.\n    private static void PrintBiggestWin(List<Transaction> allTransactions)\n    {\n        var biggestWin = allTransactions\n            .Where(t => t.Type == TransactionType.Win)\n            .OrderByDescending(t => t.Amount)\n            .FirstOrDefault();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 7. Biggest single win ===\");\n        if (biggestWin != null)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {biggestWin.Amount} EUR by player ID {biggestWin.PlayerId}\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 8. GROUPBY ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    // Groups available tables by their GameType enum value.\n    // Result is IEnumerable<IGrouping<GameType, Table>>.\n    private static void PrintTablesByGame(List<Table> allTables)\n    {\n        var groups = allTables\n            .Where(t => t.IsAvailable)\n            .GroupBy(t => t.Game.Type)\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 8. Available tables grouped by game ===\");\n        foreach (var group in groups)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  [{group.Key}]\");\n            foreach (var t in group)\n                Console.WriteLine($\"    Table {t.TableNumber} | min: {t.MinBet} EUR\");\n        }\n    }\n\n    // ── 9. ANY ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n    // Any is a short-circuit terminator – stops as soon as one match is found.\n    private static void PrintPokerAvailability(List<Casino> casinos)\n    {\n        bool pokerAvailable = casinos\n            .Any(c => c.Tables.Any(t => t.Game.Type == GameType.Poker && t.IsAvailable));\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"\\n=== 9. Poker table available right now: {pokerAvailable} ===\");\n    }\n\n    // ── 10. SELECT projection (implicit join via navigation properties) ───────\n    // Navigation properties (Player, Table.Casino, Table.Game) are already\n    // loaded in memory, so no explicit join syntax is needed.\n    private static void PrintReservationSummary(List<Reservation> reservations)\n    {\n        var summary = reservations\n            .Select(r => new\n            {\n                Player = $\"{r.Player.FirstName} {r.Player.LastName}\",\n                Casino = r.Table.Casino?.Name ?? \"N/A\",\n                Game   = r.Table.Game.Name,\n                At     = r.ReservedAt\n            })\n            .OrderBy(r => r.At)\n            .ToList();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"\\n=== 10. Reservation summary ===\");\n        foreach (var r in summary)\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  {r.Player} @ {r.Casino} – {r.Game} – {r.At:g}\");\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n    }\n\n    // ── async / await DB equivalents ─────────────────────────────────────────\n    // The methods above run on in-memory lists (no I/O → no async needed).\n    // When querying the real database through EF Core, swap the terminating\n    // call for its async counterpart and mark the method async Task<…>:\n    //\n    //   // Sync – blocks the thread for the full SQL round-trip\n    //   List<Table> tables = db.Tables.Where(t => t.IsAvailable).ToList();\n    //\n    //   // Async – releases the thread while SQL Server works\n    //   List<Table> tables = await db.Tables\n    //       .Include(t => t.Game)\n    //       .Where(t => t.IsAvailable)\n    //       .ToListAsync();\n    //\n    //   decimal won = await db.Transactions\n    //       .Where(t => t.Type == TransactionType.Win)\n    //       .SumAsync(t => t.Amount);\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01R13j9Xqz15GN9kZrfCoJkG"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Write","tool_input":{"file_path":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet/Program.cs","content":"using aspnet.Data;\nusing aspnet.Queries;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\n\n// Build in-memory seed data (casinos, players, reservations …)\nvar seed = SeedData.Create();\n\n// Run all LINQ queries and print results to the console\nCasinoQueries.RunAndPrint(seed);\n\n// ── ASP.NET host setup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\nbuilder.Services.AddDbContext<CasinoDbContext>(options =>\n    options.UseSqlServer(builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString(\"DefaultConnection\")));\n\nbuilder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n\nvar app = builder.Build();\n\nif (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment())\n{\n    app.UseExceptionHandler(\"/Home/Error\");\n    app.UseHsts();\n}\n\napp.UseHttpsRedirection();\napp.UseRouting();\napp.UseAuthorization();\napp.MapStaticAssets();\napp.MapControllerRoute(name: \"default\", pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\")\n   .WithStaticAssets();\n\napp.Run();\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YTQqx3Aif8arPvcgaGHnpH"}
{"session_id":"39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d","transcript_path":"/home/ilija/.claude/projects/-home-ilija-RiderProjects-aspnet/39cd1fe8-560e-4ac9-b59d-b6738cf3bc8d.jsonl","cwd":"/home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet","permission_mode":"acceptEdits","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"dotnet build /home/ilija/RiderProjects/aspnet/aspnet 2>&1 | tail -3","timeout":30000,"description":"Verify build"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KfV5F1LaLGMYZYiujobG4M"}
